text:
Once upon a time, there were two mice. Misha loved to explore the city; Wolfgang wasn’t quite as adventurous. One day, they discovered an old piano abandoned in a cluttered garage. Misha fell in love with it immediately.

They taught themselves to play together. Misha's small paws were nimble. Wolfgang's big claws could pluck things accurately. Soon they were jamming.

They’d play for hours, dreaming of big concerts. One day, they heard a woman humming a beautiful old tune. They followed her into a cozy little cafe.

The woman was singing about lost dreams. They stayed until midnight, sharing stories.

The next day, they gave a little recital. Their music filled the café.

From then on, they’d play sometimes late into the night. Misha’s dreams often had the two of them in them.

They never tired of each other’s company. One night they dreamed they reached the top of Mount Olympus.
